name: BMM_GENERIC_PARAMETER
documentation: Definition of a generic parameter in a class definition of a generic type.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of the parameter, e.g. 'T' etc. The name is limited to 1 character and upper-case.

conforms_to_type.name: conforms_to_type
conforms_to_type.documentation: Optional conformance constraint that must be another valid class name.

inheritance_precursor.name: inheritance_precursor
inheritance_precursor.documentation: If set, is the corresponding generic parameter definition in an ancestor class.

flattened_conforms_to_type.name: flattened_conforms_to_type
flattened_conforms_to_type.documentation: Get any ultimate type conformance constraint on this generic parameter due to inheritance.

effective_conforms_to_type.name: effective_conforms_to_type
effective_conforms_to_type.documentation: Generate ultimate conformance type, which is either from `conforms_to_type' or if not set, 'Any'.

type_signature.name: type_signature
type_signature.documentation: Signature form of the open type, including constrainer type if there is one, e.g. 'T:Ordered'.
